Package frc.robot.subsystems

Class Shooter.ShooterModule

java.lang.Object
frc.robot.subsystems.Shooter.ShooterModule
Enclosing class:
Shooter
public static class Shooter.ShooterModule extends Object
Base shooter module.

  • Constructor Details

    • ShooterModule

      private ShooterModule(ShooterConstants.ShooterModuleConstants moduleConstants)
      Creates and configures a shooter module.
      Parameters:
      moduleConstants - configuration for this shooter module. See ShooterConstants.ShooterModuleConstants.

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start(double rpm)
      Starts the shooter at an RPM.
      Parameters:
      rpm - Target shooter speed in RPM.

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the shooter.

    • getRPM

      public double getRPM()
      Returns the current shooter speed.
      Returns:
      Current shooter speed in RPM.

    • getTargetRPM

      public double getTargetRPM()
      Returns the target shooter speed.
      Returns:
      Current target speed in RPM.

    • isAtTargetRPM

      public boolean isAtTargetRPM()
      Indicates whether the shooter is at the target RPM.
      Returns:
      Whether the shooter is at the target RPM.

    • getTargetDistance

      public double getTargetDistance(edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d robotPose)
      Gets the distance from this module to the hub.
      Parameters:
      robotPose - Robot pose in field coordinates.
      Returns:
      Distance from this module to the hub.

    • getTargetAngle

      public double getTargetAngle(edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d robotPose)
      Calculates the angle from this module's location to the hub.
      Parameters:
      robotPose - Current robot pose in field coordinates.
      Returns:
      Angle in radians from the module toward the hub.
